# Instructions

- Following Playwright test failed.
- Explain why, be concise, respect Playwright best practices.
- Provide a snippet of code with the fix, if possible.

# Test info

- Name: ds4-delete-program.spec.ts >> DS-4 Delete Program (Didaxis Studio — AC-aligned) >> TC-019 - Rapid double-activation of delete does not produce duplicate dialogs / requests
- Location: tests/ds4-delete-program.spec.ts:319:7

# Error details

```
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

Expected: 1
Received: 2
```

```yaml
        - paragraph [ref=e652]: Select a program to manage semesters
```

# Test source

```ts
  245 |         await d.dismiss();
  246 |       }
  247 |     });
  248 | 
  249 |     const row = programs.programRow(programName);
  250 |     await row.clickDelete();
  251 | 
  252 |     await expect(row.row).toBeHidden();
  253 |     expect(dialogTypes).toEqual(['confirm']);
  254 |     expect(confirmMessage ?? '').toContain('<img src=x onerror=alert(1)>');
  255 |   });
  256 | 
  257 |   test('TC-014 - Special characters and Unicode in program name appear in the confirmation dialog', async ({ page }) => {
  258 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  259 |     const programName = `I.G. Renée's "Accelerated" Program ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  260 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. unicode-dialog precondition');
  261 | 
  262 |     let confirmMessage: string | undefined;
  263 |     page.once('dialog', async (d) => {
  264 |       confirmMessage = d.message();
  265 |       await d.accept();
  266 |     });
  267 | 
  268 |     const row = programs.programRow(programName);
  269 |     await row.clickDelete();
  270 | 
  271 |     await expect(row.row).toBeHidden();
  272 |     expect(confirmMessage ?? '').toContain(programName);
  273 |   });
  274 | 
  275 |   // Reliably reaching a 0-program state requires tenant isolation; the
  276 |   // shared test tenant has too many residual rows to drain deterministically.
  277 |   // The Block 4 stricter regression suite covers exact empty-state copy.
  278 |   test.skip('TC-015 - Deleting the last program reveals an empty state', async () => {
  279 |     // Per-tenant or fixture-reset run only.
  280 |   });
  281 | 
  282 |   // Reaching the duplicate-row state requires direct DB seeding; the live
  283 |   // Create flow rejects duplicates per DS-3 AC3.
  284 |   test.skip('TC-016 - Deleting one row of a legacy duplicate-name pair removes only that row', async () => {
  285 |     // Pre-seed two rows with identical names, then delete the second only.
  286 |   });
  287 | 
  288 |   test('TC-017 - Name freed by delete is re-usable in a subsequent Create', async ({ page }) => {
  289 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  290 |     const programName = `I.G. Reusable ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  291 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. first incarnation');
  292 | 
  293 |     await programs.programRow(programName).clickDeleteAccept();
  294 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toHaveCount(0);
  295 | 
  296 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. second incarnation');
  297 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toBeVisible();
  298 |   });
  299 | 
  300 |   test('TC-018 - Long program name (255 chars) is handled gracefully in the confirmation dialog', async ({ page }) => {
  301 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  302 |     const programName = `I.G. ${'P'.repeat(250)}`;
  303 |     expect(programName).toHaveLength(255);
  304 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. long-name precondition');
  305 | 
  306 |     let confirmMessage: string | undefined;
  307 |     page.once('dialog', async (d) => {
  308 |       confirmMessage = d.message();
  309 |       await d.accept();
  310 |     });
  311 | 
  312 |     const row = programs.programRow(programName);
  313 |     await row.clickDelete();
  314 | 
  315 |     await expect(row.row).toBeHidden();
  316 |     expect(confirmMessage ?? '').toContain(programName);
  317 |   });
  318 | 
  319 |   test('TC-019 - Rapid double-activation of delete does not produce duplicate dialogs / requests', async ({ page }) => {
  320 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  321 |     const programName = `I.G. DoubleDelete ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  322 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. double-delete precondition');
  323 | 
  324 |     let dialogCount = 0;
  325 |     let deleteCount = 0;
  326 |     page.on('dialog', async (d) => {
  327 |       dialogCount++;
  328 |       await d.accept();
  329 |     });
  330 |     page.on('request', (req) => {
  331 |       if (req.method() === 'DELETE' && /\/api\/programs\//.test(req.url())) {
  332 |         deleteCount++;
  333 |       }
  334 |     });
  335 | 
  336 |     const row = programs.programRow(programName);
  337 |     const deleteBtn = row.deleteButton;
  338 | 
  339 |     await Promise.all([
  340 |       deleteBtn.click(),
  341 |       deleteBtn.click({ force: true }).catch(() => {}),
  342 |     ]);
  343 | 
  344 |     await expect(row.row).toBeHidden();
> 345 |     expect(dialogCount).toBe(1);
      |                         ^ Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
  346 |     expect(deleteCount).toBe(1);
  347 |   });
  348 | 
  349 |   // Requires two concurrent admin sessions deleting the same row. Out of
  350 |   // scope for a single-page test.
  351 |   test.skip('TC-020 - Concurrent confirmed deletes from two sessions on the same program', async () => {
  352 |     // Use two browser.newContext() sessions deleting at nearly the same
  353 |     // time; one returns 200, the other 404/no-op; both lists converge.
  354 |   });
  355 | 
  356 |   test('TC-021 - After delete success, navigating away and back still shows program absent', async ({ page }) => {
  357 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  358 |     const shell = new AppShell(page);
  359 |     const programName = `I.G. Obsolete ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  360 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. obsolete precondition');
  361 | 
  362 |     await programs.programRow(programName).clickDeleteAccept();
  363 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toHaveCount(0);
  364 | 
  365 |     await shell.goToDashboard();
  366 |     await shell.goToPrograms();
  367 | 
  368 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toHaveCount(0);
  369 |   });
  370 | 
  371 |   test('TC-022 - Keyboard activation: focus + Enter on the delete control opens the same dialog', async ({ page }) => {
  372 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  373 |     const programName = `I.G. Keyboard ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  374 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. keyboard precondition');
  375 | 
  376 |     const dialogTypes: string[] = [];
  377 |     page.once('dialog', async (d) => {
  378 |       dialogTypes.push(d.type());
  379 |       await d.accept();
  380 |     });
  381 | 
  382 |     const row = programs.programRow(programName);
  383 |     await row.deleteButton.focus();
  384 |     await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
  385 | 
  386 |     await expect(row.row).toBeHidden();
  387 |     expect(dialogTypes).toEqual(['confirm']);
  388 |   });
  389 | });
  390 | 
```
